title: Kuwait NBK Q2 net profit edges up; beats estimate
summary: For H1 2026, the bank reported 3% higher net profit on year
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
View of cylindrical NBK Tower in Kuwait City, Kuwait. Image used for illustrative purpose. Image courtesy: Getty Images/ Emad aljumah

For H1 2026, the bank reported 3% higher net profit on year

Staff Writer ,  ZAWYA

National Bank of Kuwait posted a Q2 2026 net profit attributable to shareholders of KWD 189.3 million ($613 million), 4.5% higher year-on-year (YoY) on higher operating income.
